channel.title: GitHub Erlang Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Erlang in GitHub

item.title: emqx/emqx
item.description: The most scalable open-source MQTT broker for IoT, IIoT, and connected vehicles

item.title: ninenines/gun
item.description: HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2, Websocket client (and more) for Erlang/OTP.

item.title: for-GET/jesse
item.description: jesse (JSon Schema Erlang) is an implementation of a JSON Schema validator for Erlang.

item.title: apache/couchdb
item.description: Seamless multi-master syncing database with an intuitive HTTP/JSON API, designed for reliability

item.title: chef/chef-server
item.description: Chef Infra Server is a hub for configuration data; storing cookbooks, node policies and metadata of managed nodes.

item.title: seth/ej
item.description: Helper module for working with Erlang terms representing JSON

item.title: rustyio/sync
item.description: On-the-fly recompiling and reloading in Erlang. Code without friction.

item.title: dgiot/dgiot
item.description: Open source platform for iot , 6 min Quick Deployment,10M devices connection,Carrier level Stability;物联网开源平台,6分钟快速部署,千万级承载,电信级稳定性. Low code for Object model-Rule Engine-Data Channel-Configuration Page; Fully open source, Multi industrial protocols are compatible.物模型-规则引擎-数据通道-组态页面全流程零代码开发、全业务全链路模拟压测、前后端完全开源、多行业工业协议兼容。QQ群:346566935

item.title: erlcloud/erlcloud
item.description: AWS APIs library for Erlang (Amazon EC2, S3, SQS, DDB, ELB and etc)

item.title: aeternity/aeternity
item.description: æternity blockchain - scalable blockchain for the people - smart contracts, state channels, names, tokens

item.title: proper-testing/proper
item.description: PropEr: a QuickCheck-inspired property-based testing tool for Erlang
